listings.title: Puritan PSM 156 Line Conditioner/Power Purifier
listings.body: Manufactured in the UK and bought from an authorized dealer.  Also, acts as a surge protector.  I'm the original owner and did not experience any problems such as surges. Low hours (~ 50 hours) from a smoke-free home.  Selling as I don't listen to music much anymore. The Puritan is regarded as best bang for the buck, lower cost alternative to the Audioquest Niagara. http://www.puritanaudiolabs.com/products/master-purifiers/psm156/ https://www.stevehuffphoto.com/2022/11/12/puritan-audio-psm-156-is-worth-its-weight-in-gold/ Cash only.  No trades or low ball offers.  I've priced it fairly based on the low hours and I'm not collecting sales tax. Please note that I live in northern Westchester and am only able to meetup curbside in NYC (ie., Manhattan's Inwood, Eastside, Downtown Manhattan/Brooklyn, Navy Yard, Ft. Greene, Clinton Hill, North Williamsburg, Greenpoint, LIC/Queens) or along the Sprain/Taconic on Sunday (sometimes Saturday) mornings. I would need to know by Friday afternoon.  Preference for meeting in Inwood or Chinatown when in NYC.  It's lightweight enough to transport on the subway.  $20 extra to meet in an outer borough to cover extra time, gas and tolls. When replying, let me know when, where you would like to meet along with your contact # to coordinate pickup.  People who use aliases, fake/partial names or Google numbers will be ignored as they tend to be scammers, trolls or sneaky types. Post will be taken down once sold.  All sales final. Audiophile  Furman

listings.title: Pangea Power Cable/Cord
listings.body: Selling my Pangea powers cords as I don't listen to music as much.  These are the originals and improves the overall sound. The AC9 cords are actually 7 gauge; thick as a 3/4" garden hose. "You Don’t Always Have to Pay a Lot to Get a Lot" "The AC-9 is a perfect example of the adage that you don’t always have to pay a lot to get a lot, notes Sean Fowler in his April 13, 2010 review of the original-model AC-9 for SonicFlare.com. "As I listen to the AC-9, I struggle to think of a time when I heard any other affordable power cord deliver such a natural presentation without committing some kind of damning caveat." Everything was gently used or new/unused.  I am the original owner and not entertaining low ball offers even for multiple pieces; esp. if I have to drive to an outer borough as it adds significant travel time to my drive home. AC14 2.0 meters - SOLD AC14 C7 (meant for source components such as TV's, soundbars, DVD players...etc.) 3.0 meters - $100 (new in box) AC9 1.5 meters - $125 AC9 2.0 meters - $175 AC9SE 2.0 meters $225 I also have a 1.5 meter and 2.0 meter Pangea 24PC 4% sliver plated HDMI cables that are barely used; $20 or $25 respectively. Please note that I live in northern Westchester so am only free to meet in Manhattan's Inwood, Eastside, Downtown Manhattan/Brooklyn, Navy Yard, Ft. Greene,  Clinton Hill,  North Williamsburg, Greenpoint, LIC or along the Sprain/Taconic on Sunday (sometimes Saturday) mornings. I would need to know by Friday afternoon.  Preference for pickup in Inwood or Chinatown/LES when in NYC. When replying, let me know when, where you can meet along with your contact # to coordinate pickup. Post will be updated once a cable has sold. Cash only/All sales final. Audiophile

listings.title: Real Traps Mondo Corner Bass Traps (6)
listings.body: Each trap measures 24"w x 57"h x 4"d in wheat color and comes with 2 wall brackets for hanging away from the wall to improve absorption.  Perfect for a music listening room or sound studio.  Pet/smoke-free home. Looking to sell all as a set for $2,000 cash firm.  This is 30% off the original price for all 6 traps and brackets with shipping, and avoids the 3-4 weeks production time.  Might sell in pairs for a smaller discount in the future if there's no interest in all 6. Real Traps is one of the top names (others include RPG Acoustics, Acoustic Sciences Corp, Stillpoints and more expensive) in sound treatment and seldom come up for sale on CL especially the Fat Mondo traps. I'm not entertaining lower offers as I'm in no rush or desperate to sell them.  There are lower-priced alternatives from brands such as ATS, GIK, Primacoustic, Acoustimac that use cheaper materials and construction. https://realtraps.com/reviews.htm https://realtraps.com/prices.htm https://realtraps.com/p_mondotrap.htm If interested, let me know when you would like to pick them up (no delivery.)  I'm free most days and evenings. Ad will be updated once sold.

listings.title: TrippLite Home Theater Power/Line Conditioner/Surge Protector
listings.body: Model: HT1210ISOCTR in excellent/like new condition from original owner and smoke-free home.  I bought this directly from Tripp Lite for $449 + shipping/taxes.  Nothing wrong with it and it never had any problems, surges or spikes.  Comes with manual, original unused accessories; rack mounts,  coaxial cable, telephone wire and remote (used a couple of times then put away.) Cash and carry.  No low ballers, please. 5,700 joules surge protection $150,000 lifetime equipment protection http://www.laaudiofile.com/ht1210isoctr.html Please note that I can only meet Manhattan's Inwood, Eastside/Downtown (Gramercy Park,East Village/LES/Chinatown,) Downtown Brooklyn, Navy Yard, Ft. Greene, Clinton Hill, North Williamsburg, Greenpoint, LIC/Queens or along the Sprain/Taconic on Sunday mornings. I would need to know by Saturday afternoon.  Preference for meeting in Chinatown when in NYC.  $20 delivery fee to an outer borough to cover extra time, gas and tolls. When replying, let me know when, where you would like to meet along with your phone number to coordinate pickup. Cash and carry/All sales final. Ad will be taken down once sold. Tripp Lite

listings.title: HUGE LOT of New York Collectibles
listings.body: These historical memorabilia collectibles are perfect for those interested in New York. Great for collectors to enjoy! * LOT of 4 Enamel New York Pins * 10 Central Park Conservancy Blank Note Cards with Envelopes Each Note Card Measures Approximately: 6.75” x 4.75” Condition: These note cards have never been used and are in pristine condition from a smoke-FREE home! What you will receive: (2) Springtime in the Park ~ Photo by: Elliot Stern (2) Cherry Hill Fountain ~ Photo by: Elliot Stern (2) Burnett Fountain ~ Photo by: Sara Cedar Miller (2) The Mall ~ Photo by: Zach Nelson (2) Bow Bridge ~ Photo by: Hideki Aono *The New York Landmarks Conservancy Post Cards *Lot of 15* Each Post Card Measures Approximately: 6” t x 4.5” W Condition: These postcards have never been used and are in pristine condition from a smoke-FREE home! The New York Landmarks Conservancy is a non-profit organization "dedicated to preserving, revitalizing, and reusing New York’s architecturally significant buildings." It provides technical assistance, project management services, grants, and loans to owners of historic properties in New York State. What you will receive: (5) Chrysler Building, 1930 (5) Flatiron Building, 1902 (5) Brooklyn Bridge, 1883 *Collection of Small Posters of The Statue of Liberty & Ellis Island: A Timeline & Statue of Liberty Museum Pamphlet (See pictures for full descriptions) Shipping available at buyer's expense.
